name: Cytosorbents Corp
summary: CytoSorbents Corporation is a medical technology company focused on critical care immunotherapy. The company develops and commercializes blood purification technologies, with its primary product CytoSorb, a broad-spectrum cytokine adsorber used in critical illness and cardiac surgery. CytoSorbents also develops related blood purification and drug removal technologies for clinical applications in intensive care and surgical settings.
